scenes.heading: What Is a Connector?
scenes.narration: A connector gives A I hands, to reach your real apps and your data.

scenes.heading: Without One
scenes.narration: Without one, you are the middleman, copying things in and out by hand.

scenes.heading: With One
scenes.narration: With one, it reads your inbox or your drive, live, by itself.

scenes.heading: Grant the least you need
scenes.narration: Grant read only first. Add write access only when you truly need it.

scenes.heading: Only connect what you need.
scenes.narration: And always check its answer against the real source.
